description: Letter fragment. in Hebrew. Dating to the sixteenth or seventeenth century based on the paleography. Someone with the name Zerḥiya (זרחיה) is mentioned in line 4, which is commonly a surname but in this instance may be a first name based on where it appears in the honorifics. MCD.
description_he: קטע ממכתב. בעברית. תיארוך לפי הפליאוגרפיה: המאה ה-16 או ה-17. השם זרחיה מוזכר בשורה 4. MCD.
